fa-hat-wizard.appearanceId: a tall pointed conical wizard hat with a wide brim and decorative stars or bands along the body; dunce-cap-like pointed headgear silhouette with ornamental markings on the cone
fa-hat-wizard.functionalityId: represents magic, wizardry, or a setup wizard feature; opens an automated guided configuration or onboarding wizard
fa-hat-wizard.intentId: launch a step-by-step setup or configuration wizard; access magic or fantasy-themed content

fa-hdd.appearanceId: a flat rectangular hard disk drive body with a circular platter shape inside and a small connector strip along one short edge; low-profile drive enclosure outline with a round internal disc element
fa-hdd.functionalityId: represents a hard disk drive or local storage device; navigates to storage management or disk settings
fa-hdd.intentId: manage local disk storage or drive settings; monitor or configure a hard drive

fa-head-side.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in profile view facing left, showing the outline of the skull, forehead, nose, and chin with no additional overlay; plain side-view head contour with a smooth jawline and no badge
fa-head-side.functionalityId: represents a human profile or person silhouette; navigates to a user profile or identity section
fa-head-side.intentId: access a user profile or identity view; represent a person in a neutral side-profile context

fa-head-side-brain.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a detailed brain shape visible through the upper skull area; side-view head outline with a folded cerebral cortex overlay in the cranial region
fa-head-side-brain.functionalityId: represents cognitive function, mental health, or neuroscience content; navigates to a brain health or mental wellness section
fa-head-side-brain.intentId: access mental health or cognitive content; explore neuroscience or brain-related information

fa-head-side-cough.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with small arc or droplet lines projecting from the mouth area suggesting coughing; side-view head outline with spray particle arcs near the mouth
fa-head-side-cough.functionalityId: represents coughing, respiratory symptoms, or illness indicators; marks health content related to airborne illness
fa-head-side-cough.intentId: indicate a coughing symptom or respiratory illness; log or track a cough-related health event

fa-head-side-cough-slash.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with cough droplet arcs near the mouth and a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire shape; side-view head with spray arcs overlaid by a cancellation line
fa-head-side-cough-slash.functionalityId: represents cough prevention, suppression, or a cough-free status; marks content indicating that coughing is controlled or stopped
fa-head-side-cough-slash.intentId: indicate that coughing is being suppressed or prevented; mark a cough-free or respiratory-clear status

fa-head-side-gear.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a toothed gear wheel badge overlaid on the cranial area; side-view head outline with a cog symbol on the upper skull region
fa-head-side-gear.functionalityId: represents cognitive settings, mental configuration, or thought process management; opens a personalized settings or mind-related configuration panel
fa-head-side-gear.intentId: configure personal settings or cognitive preferences; access mental or thought process management tools

fa-head-side-headphones.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a pair of over-ear headphones depicted on the head wrapping around the ear and over the top; side-view head outline with an audio headset accessory overlay
fa-head-side-headphones.functionalityId: represents audio listening, music playback, or headphone use; navigates to an audio or media player section
fa-head-side-headphones.intentId: access audio listening or music playback features; indicate headphone use or audio-focused mode

fa-head-side-heart.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a heart shape badge overlaid on the cranial or facial area; side-view head outline with a love or care symbol on the upper portion
fa-head-side-heart.functionalityId: represents mental wellness, emotional health, or compassionate thinking; navigates to a mental health or emotional support section
fa-head-side-heart.intentId: access emotional health or mental wellness content; express care or compassion in a health context

fa-head-side-mask.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a face mask shape covering the mouth and nose area; side-view head outline with a surgical or protective mask overlay on the lower face
fa-head-side-mask.functionalityId: represents mask wearing, infection prevention, or respiratory protection; marks health content related to face coverings
fa-head-side-mask.intentId: indicate mask-wearing or respiratory protection requirements; access pandemic or infection-prevention health content

fa-head-side-medical.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a medical cross or plus symbol badge overlaid on the cranial area; side-view head outline with a healthcare cross marker on the skull region
fa-head-side-medical.functionalityId: represents medical examination of the head or neurological health assessment; navigates to a head-related medical or clinical section
fa-head-side-medical.intentId: access head-related medical or neurological health information; log or track a medical head examination

fa-head-side-virus.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in left-facing profile with a spiky circular virus particle shape overlaid near the head; side-view head outline with a viral pathogen badge with radiating spike projections
fa-head-side-virus.functionalityId: represents viral infection of the head or brain, or infectious disease symptoms; navigates to virus or infection-related health content
fa-head-side-virus.intentId: access information about viral infections affecting the head or brain; track or report infectious disease symptoms

fa-head-vr.appearanceId: a human head silhouette in forward or profile view wearing a virtual reality headset visor covering the eye area; head outline with a wide rectangular VR goggle device strapped over the eyes
fa-head-vr.functionalityId: represents virtual reality usage, VR content, or immersive experiences; navigates to a VR application or headset settings section
fa-head-vr.intentId: access virtual reality content or VR headset settings; launch an immersive or VR experience

fa-header.appearanceId: a bold uppercase letter H with a small subscript numeral one forming a typographic heading indicator; large heading letterform with a subordinate digit badge
fa-header.functionalityId: applies a heading text style or H1 formatting to selected text; marks a block of text as a document header
fa-header.intentId: format text as a heading in a document or rich text editor; apply heading hierarchy to document content

fa-headphones.appearanceId: a classic over-ear headphone set with two circular ear cups connected by an arched headband; symmetrical audio headset outline with round pads and a curved top band
fa-headphones.functionalityId: represents audio playback or music listening; navigates to a music player or audio settings section
fa-headphones.intentId: access music or audio playback features; configure headphone or audio output settings

fa-headphones-alt.appearanceId: an alternative headphone design with open or smaller ear cups and a thinner headband arc compared to the standard headphones; lightweight headset silhouette with a slimmer band and smaller earcup profile
fa-headphones-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative or lightweight audio headset; navigates to alternate audio device settings or a secondary playback mode
fa-headphones-alt.intentId: access audio playback with a lightweight or alternative headset; switch to a secondary audio device or output mode

fa-headset.appearanceId: a single-ear headphone with a circular ear cup on one side and a thin adjustable boom microphone arm extending from the earcup toward the mouth; one-sided headset silhouette with a mic boom attachment
fa-headset.functionalityId: represents a customer service headset, voice chat device, or call center tool; opens a voice call or communication audio settings section
fa-headset.intentId: access voice call or customer support communication tools; configure a headset for calls or voice chat

fa-heart.appearanceId: a classic symmetrical heart shape with two rounded lobes at the top meeting at a central point at the bottom; solid or outlined cardiac love-symbol silhouette
fa-heart.functionalityId: marks an item as liked, loved, or favorited; adds an item to a favorites or wishlist collection
fa-heart.intentId: like or favorite a piece of content; save an item to a personal favorites list

fa-heart-circle-bolt.appearanceId: a heart shape with a small overlapping circle badge containing a lightning bolt in the lower-right corner; cardiac love symbol with a power or energy indicator circle attached
fa-heart-circle-bolt.functionalityId: represents a heart rate boost, energy surge, or powered health metric; indicates an energized or high-intensity cardiac status
fa-heart-circle-bolt.intentId: track a high-energy or boosted heart rate metric; indicate an energized or powered health state

fa-heart-circle-check.appearanceId: a heart shape with a small overlapping circle badge containing a checkmark in the lower-right corner; cardiac love symbol with a confirmation or approval indicator circle attached
fa-heart-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a health goal as achieved or a favorite item as confirmed; indicates a verified or approved heart-related status
fa-heart-circle-check.intentId: confirm a health goal or favorite item has been completed; verify a cardiac health milestone

fa-heart-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: a heart shape with a small overlapping circle badge containing an exclamation mark in the lower-right corner; cardiac love symbol with a warning or alert indicator circle attached
fa-heart-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: indicates a heart health alert or urgent cardiac warning; flags a liked item as requiring attention
fa-heart-circle-exclamation.intentId: alert the user to a cardiac health issue or urgent heart metric; flag a favorite item with a critical warning

fa-heart-circle-minus.appearanceId: a heart shape with a small overlapping circle badge containing a minus sign in the lower-right corner; cardiac love symbol with a removal or decrease indicator circle attached
fa-heart-circle-minus.functionalityId: removes a heart health item or decreases a cardiac metric; removes an item from a favorites list
fa-heart-circle-minus.intentId: remove an item from favorites or decrease a cardiac health metric; unfavorite or reduce a heart-related count

fa-heart-circle-plus.appearanceId: a heart shape with a small overlapping circle badge containing a plus sign in the lower-right corner; cardiac love symbol with an addition or increase indicator circle attached
fa-heart-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds a new item to a favorites list or increases a cardiac health metric; creates a new heart-related entry
fa-heart-circle-plus.intentId: add a new item to favorites or increase a cardiac health metric; create a new heart-related record

fa-heart-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a heart shape with a small overlapping circle badge containing an X mark in the lower-right corner; cardiac love symbol with a rejection or cancellation indicator circle attached
fa-heart-circle-xmark.functionalityId: removes or rejects a favorited item; cancels or dismisses a heart-related health entry
fa-heart-circle-xmark.intentId: unlike or reject a favorited item; cancel or dismiss a cardiac health notification

fa-heart-crack.appearanceId: a heart shape with a jagged vertical crack or split line running from the top center down through the lower point; cardiac love symbol divided by a lightning-bolt-like fracture line
fa-heart-crack.functionalityId: represents heartbreak, loss, or emotional pain; indicates a failed or broken connection or relationship
fa-heart-crack.intentId: express heartbreak or emotional pain; indicate a broken or failed relationship or connection

fa-heart-half.appearanceId: a heart shape filled on the left half and empty or outlined on the right half, creating a split filled-and-empty appearance; partially colored cardiac symbol with one solid and one hollow lobe
fa-heart-half.functionalityId: represents a partial like or half-hearted rating; indicates a midpoint or incomplete favoriting state
fa-heart-half.intentId: indicate a partial or half-completed rating; express a lukewarm or partial preference

fa-heart-half-alt.appearanceId: a heart shape with a variant half-fill pattern, such as the right lobe filled or a different dividing orientation than the standard half heart; alternate split-filled cardiac symbol with a different half shading arrangement
fa-heart-half-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate partial rating or a reversed half-heart fill; indicates a different midpoint favoriting state
fa-heart-half-alt.intentId: indicate an alternative partial rating or reverse half-like state; express a variant partial preference

fa-heart-rate.appearanceId: a heart shape with a continuous electrocardiogram pulse waveform line running through the center horizontally; cardiac love symbol with a spiked EKG or heartbeat trace crossing through it
fa-heart-rate.functionalityId: displays or monitors a heart rate or cardiac rhythm metric; navigates to a heart rate tracking or vitals section
fa-heart-rate.intentId: monitor heart rate or cardiac rhythm data; access vitals or health tracking for heart rate

fa-heart-square.appearanceId: a heart shape centered inside a rounded square or rectangular container outline; cardiac love symbol enclosed within a square frame or button shape
fa-heart-square.functionalityId: marks an item as a favorite within a contained action button; represents a favoriting or liking control in a square UI element
fa-heart-square.intentId: favorite or like an item using a square-shaped control; access a heart-shaped action within a box container

fa-heartbeat.appearanceId: a horizontal flat line that rises into a sharp upward spike and then a deeper downward trough before returning to baseline, resembling an ECG pulse trace; continuous EKG waveform with a tall spike and valley
fa-heartbeat.functionalityId: represents a live heartbeat, vitals monitoring, or health activity status; displays a real-time cardiac or health metric
fa-heartbeat.intentId: monitor real-time heart rate or vitals; indicate that a health system or person is alive and active

fa-heat.appearanceId: upward-curving wavy lines resembling heat shimmer or thermal radiation rising from a surface; multiple undulating vertical wavy lines suggesting warmth or thermal emission
fa-heat.functionalityId: represents heat, thermal output, or temperature elevation; indicates that a device or system is producing heat or is in a high-temperature state
fa-heat.intentId: monitor or indicate heat output or temperature level; access heating system controls or thermal status

fa-helicopter.appearanceId: a side-view helicopter silhouette with a main rotor blade on top, a rounded fuselage body, landing skids, and a small tail rotor; rotary-wing aircraft outline with a top-mounted blade and rear stabilizer
fa-helicopter.functionalityId: represents helicopter transport, aerial support, or aviation content; navigates to a helicopter service or flight tracking section
fa-helicopter.intentId: access helicopter transport or aerial service information; track or book a helicopter flight

fa-helicopter-symbol.appearanceId: a capital letter H enclosed within or associated with a circle or bordered shape, resembling a helipad landing marker; blocky H letterform inside a circular border as a landing zone indicator
fa-helicopter-symbol.functionalityId: marks a helipad location or helicopter landing zone; navigates to a helicopter landing area or aviation facility
fa-helicopter-symbol.intentId: find or mark a helipad or helicopter landing zone; indicate an aviation landing area on a map

fa-helmet-battle.appearanceId: a rounded medieval or fantasy battle helmet with a full visor, cheek guards, and a crest or ridge on top; armored headgear silhouette with a face plate and protective side panels
fa-helmet-battle.functionalityId: represents a battle, combat, or warrior role in a game or fantasy context; navigates to a combat or armor equipment section
fa-helmet-battle.intentId: access battle equipment or combat-related content; equip or select a warrior helmet in a game

fa-helmet-un.appearanceId: a rounded hard hat or peacekeeper helmet with the letters UN printed on the front panel; smooth dome-shaped protective helmet outline with a text label badge
fa-helmet-un.functionalityId: represents United Nations peacekeeping forces or humanitarian operations; marks content related to UN military or aid missions
fa-helmet-un.intentId: access United Nations peacekeeping or humanitarian mission content; identify UN-affiliated personnel or operations

fa-hexagon.appearanceId: a plain regular six-sided polygon outline with equal sides and a flat top and bottom edge; simple hexagonal frame shape with no interior content
fa-hexagon.functionalityId: represents a hexagonal container, badge, or geometric shape element; marks a category or item with a hexagonal label
fa-hexagon.intentId: use a hexagonal shape as a container or badge; categorize or label content with a hexagonal marker

fa-hexagon-check.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with a checkmark symbol centered inside the hexagonal frame; hexagonal badge shape with a tick or confirmation mark in the interior
fa-hexagon-check.functionalityId: marks an item as verified, approved, or completed within a hexagonal badge; confirms a task or status within a hex-shaped indicator
fa-hexagon-check.intentId: confirm or verify an item with a hexagonal badge; mark a task or status as approved or complete

fa-hexagon-divide.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with a horizontal or diagonal dividing line splitting the interior into two sections; hexagonal frame with a division or separator line through the center
fa-hexagon-divide.functionalityId: represents a division or splitting operation within a hexagonal badge; marks a segmented or divided category label
fa-hexagon-divide.intentId: divide or segment content using a hexagonal marker; indicate a split or bifurcated category

fa-hexagon-exclamation.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with an exclamation mark symbol centered inside the hexagonal frame; hexagonal badge shape with a warning or alert mark in the interior
fa-hexagon-exclamation.functionalityId: indicates a warning, alert, or important notice within a hexagonal badge; flags a critical status or attention-required item
fa-hexagon-exclamation.intentId: alert the user to an important warning or critical status in a hexagonal context; flag an item requiring urgent attention

fa-hexagon-image.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with a small mountain-and-sun landscape image placeholder inside; hexagonal frame containing a photo thumbnail or picture symbol
fa-hexagon-image.functionalityId: represents an image or photo within a hexagonal crop or frame; displays a hexagonally-shaped profile picture or media asset
fa-hexagon-image.intentId: display a hexagonally-cropped image or profile photo; use a hexagonal frame for a media thumbnail

fa-hexagon-minus.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with a minus sign or horizontal bar centered inside the hexagonal frame; hexagonal badge shape with a subtraction or remove mark in the interior
fa-hexagon-minus.functionalityId: removes or decrements an item within a hexagonal badge indicator; marks a reduction or removal action in a hex-shaped control
fa-hexagon-minus.intentId: remove or decrease an item using a hexagonal badge control; subtract from a count within a hex-shaped indicator

fa-hexagon-nodes.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with nodes or dots at each vertex connected by lines suggesting a network graph; hexagonal frame with circular endpoint dots and connecting edge lines
fa-hexagon-nodes.functionalityId: represents a network topology, node graph, or connected system within a hexagonal shape; navigates to a network or graph visualization section
fa-hexagon-nodes.intentId: visualize or manage a network topology or connected node graph; access a hexagonal network diagram or system map

fa-hexagon-nodes-bolt.functionalityId: represents a powered or energized network topology; indicates active or high-speed connectivity within a node graph
fa-hexagon-nodes-bolt.intentId: indicate an active or high-energy network connection; access an energized or real-time node graph visualization

fa-hexagon-plus.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon outline with a plus sign centered inside the hexagonal frame; hexagonal badge shape with an addition or create mark in the interior
fa-hexagon-plus.functionalityId: adds a new item or creates a new entry within a hexagonal badge indicator; marks an addition action in a hex-shaped control
fa-hexagon-plus.intentId: add or create a new item using a hexagonal badge control; increment a count within a hex-shaped indicator

fa-hexagon-vertical-nft.appearanceId: a regular six-sided polygon oriented with a flat side at the top and bottom, with the letters NFT displayed vertically inside; vertically-oriented hexagonal frame containing stacked NFT text characters
fa-hexagon-vertical-nft.functionalityId: represents an NFT token or digital collectible within a hexagonal badge; navigates to an NFT marketplace or digital asset section

fa-hexagon-xmark.functionalityId: cancels or closes an item within a hexagonal badge indicator; marks a rejection or removal action in a hex-shaped control
fa-hexagon-xmark.intentId: cancel or reject an item using a hexagonal badge control; close or dismiss a hex-labeled entry

fa-highlighter.appearanceId: an angled marker or highlighting pen with a broad chisel tip at one end and a cap at the other, shown at a diagonal; felt-tip marker silhouette with a flat wide nib and cylindrical barrel

fa-highlighter.intentId: highlight or annotate text in a document or editor; mark important passages for review or emphasis
